positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical celestial garden composition featuring bioluminescent flora interwoven with stylized astronomical elements. The main subject is a central, ornate mandala formed by glowing ferns, deep purple cosmic nebula dust, and geometric sapphire-blue crystalline structures. The style should be Neo-Art Deco meets ethereal botanicals, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast against a deep indigo background. Focus on symmetrical arrangement, perfect negative space, and highly defined edges suitable for screen printing. Cinematic volumetric lighting, vaporwave color grading, intricate line work, vector illustration quality.
